Language: rust
Coding Agent Harness

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AlexsJones/llmfit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AlexsJones/llmfit
Language: rust
Hundreds of models & providers. One command to find what runs on your hardware.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: EasyTier/EasyTier
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EasyTier/EasyTier
Language: rust
A simple, decentralized mesh VPN with WireGuard support.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Hmbown/DeepSeek-TUI
Language: rust
Coding agent for DeepSeek models that runs in your terminal

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bevyengine/bevy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bevyengine/bevy
Language: rust
A refreshingly simple data-driven game engine built in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: gfx-rs/wgpu
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/gfx-rs/wgpu
Language: rust
A cross-platform, safe, pure-Rust graphics API.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hickory-dns/hickory-dns
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hickory-dns/hickory-dns
Language: rust
A Rust based DNS client, server, and resolver

ns0:entry.ns0:title: junhoyeo/tokscale
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/junhoyeo/tokscale
Language: rust
🛰️ A CLI tool for tracking token usage from OpenCode, Claude Code, 🦞OpenClaw (Clawdbot/Moltbot), Pi, Codex, Gemini, Cursor, AmpCode, Factory Droid, Kimi, and more! • 🏅Global Leaderboard + 2D/3D Contributions Graph

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mikeyobrien/ralph-orchestrator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mikeyobrien/ralph-orchestrator
Language: rust
An improved implementation of the Ralph Wiggum technique for autonomous AI agent orchestration

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nautechsystems/nautilus_trader
Language: rust
Production-grade Rust-native trading engine with deterministic event-driven architecture

ns0:entry.ns0:title: neondatabase/neon
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/neondatabase/neon
Language: rust
Neon: Serverless Postgres. We separated storage and compute to offer autoscaling, code-like database branching, and scale to zero.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: njbrake/agent-of-empires
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/njbrake/agent-of-empires
Language: rust
Manage multiple Claude Code, OpenCode agents from either TUI or Web for easy access on mobile. Also supports Mistral Vibe, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi.dev, Copilot CLI, Factory Droid Coding. Uses tmux and git worktrees.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ruvnet/RuView
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ruvnet/RuView
Language: rust
π RuView: WiFi DensePose turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time human pose estimation, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: swc-project/swc
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/swc-project/swc
Language: rust
Rust-based platform for the Web

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tonhowtf/omniget
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tonhowtf/omniget
Language: rust
Open source desktop app for studying online courses and books on your computer. Watch Hotmart, Udemy, Kiwify courses with timestamped notes, spaced repetition flashcards and a focus timer. Read PDFs and EPUBs with highlights, bookmarks and a focus mode. Also downloads YouTube, Instagram, TikTok and torrents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: tursodatabase/turso
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/tursodatabase/turso
Language: rust
Turso is an in-process SQL database, compatible with SQLite.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: vercel/turborepo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vercel/turborepo
Language: rust
Build system optimized for JavaScript and TypeScript, written in Rust

ns0:entry.ns0:title: xingkongliang/skills-manager
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/xingkongliang/skills-manager
Language: rust
A lightweight desktop app to manage, sync, and organize AI agent skills across 15+ coding tools — Cursor, Claude Code, Codex, Copilot, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zed-industries/zed
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zed-industries/zed
Language: rust
Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/zeroclaw-labs/zeroclaw
Language: rust
Fast, small, and fully autonomous AI personal assistant infrastructure, ANY OS, ANY PLATFORM — deploy anywhere, swap anything 🦀
